businessGoals: Create a memorable, entertaining personal website
Evoke 90s web nostalgia with modern tech
Express personality through interactive humor and pop culture references

userPersonas.name: Curious Visitor
userPersonas.description: Someone who lands on the site and is drawn in by the retro game aesthetic, explores for fun

userPersonas.name: Fellow Nerd
userPersonas.description: Fans of LOTR, Star Wars, Star Trek, or gaming culture who appreciate the references and humor

functionalRequirements: R001: Top-down Zelda-style game view with tile-based world
R003: Greenish background with pixelated retro aesthetic
R004: Interactive objects scattered around the world
R005: 'Welcome to the Realm' landing/title screen
R006: Fantasy + sci-fi themed world elements
R007: Absurdist comedy via NPC dialogue, object interactions, and environmental gags
R008: 90s web nostalgia visual elements (hit counters, guestbook references, under construction signs, etc.)

feasibilityAssessment: HTML5 Canvas or pixel-art CSS for rendering — Canvas preferred for game-like movement
Vanilla JS or lightweight framework (no heavy dependencies needed)
Tile-based map system for world layout
Sprite sheets for character and object animations
Simple collision detection for object interaction
implementationOrder: 8. 90s aesthetic polish (scanlines, pixel fonts, retro UI elements)
mvpFeatures: feature-001: Canvas game engine with tile map

edgeCases: Character walking off-screen / out of bounds
Rapid key presses / multiple keys held
